# SL-INDEX-007: x-robots-none-on-indexable-route

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

X-Robots-Tag contains none for an indexable route.

## Metadata

- Category: Indexability (indexability)
- Default severity: blocker
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- http-header

## Required Evidence

- route-contract
- x-robots-tag

## When This Triggers

Parse X-Robots-Tag and compare none/noindex semantics with route contract.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Remove X-Robots-Tag none from indexable responses.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/indexability/x-robots-none

Fixed direction:

- Remove X-Robots-Tag none from indexable responses.

The generated documentation does not invent HTML, DSL, source locations,
